Compliance Delivered at Scale

Real outcomes for founders, finance teams, and boards across industries. Every case study represents a compliance challenge solved — measurably, audibly, and sustainably.

Corporate Setup

FinTech Startup — Series A Compliance

End-to-end incorporation, cap table structuring, and regulatory approvals for a $12M Series A.

  • Incorporated in 7 days
  • RBI compliance ready
  • ESOP pool structured
🏥
Tax Compliance

HealthTech Scale-up — GST & TDS Automation

Automated monthly GST returns and TDS workflows across 4 states for 200+ vendors.

  • Zero late filings in 18 months
  • 40% reduction in manual effort
  • Audit-ready dashboards
📚
International

EdTech Expansion — Global Licensing

Structured Singapore subsidiary, FEMA compliance, and cross-border payment rails for Southeast Asia launch.

  • 3-country launch in 60 days
  • FEMA compliant from Day 1
  • Automated treasury ops
🏭
Advisory

Manufacturing MSME — Turnaround Advisory

Restructured debt, optimized tax positions, and implemented governance framework for a ₹50Cr manufacturer.

  • ₹2.3Cr tax savings annually
  • Debt reduced 35%
  • Board governance established

Security & Trust

SaaS Platform — SOC 2 & Data Privacy

  • SOC 2 Type II in 4 months
  • DPDP Act ready
  • Enterprise deals unlocked

Operations
